# Massaie Services

> Premium VIP concierge, medical tourism support, and luxury transportation for international patients and guests visiting Rochester, Minnesota.

Massaie Services has operated in Rochester, Minnesota for over a decade, specializing in comprehensive concierge support for international travelers — particularly those arriving for medical treatment at Rochester's world-class hospitals and specialist clinics.

## Services

- **Airport & Ground Transportation**: VIP airport transfers, 10-hour daily car service, 24/7 limousine service with vetted professional drivers
- **Accommodation**: Luxury hotels, extended-stay suites, and private furnished apartments — all proximity-matched to medical facilities and safety-vetted
- **Medical Tourism Support**: Daily hospital transport, appointment liaison, administrative navigation, scheduling coordination
- **Lifestyle & Concierge**: 24/7 personal support, grocery runs, cultural and dietary assistance, local orientation, leisure transport
- **VIP Guest Services**: Full-service concierge for executives, dignitaries, and VVIP guests visiting Rochester for any purpose

## Who We Serve

International patients traveling to Rochester, Minnesota for specialized medical treatment. Families accompanying patients. Corporate executives and VIP/VVIP guests requiring discreet, high-standard concierge services.

## Location

Rochester, Minnesota, United States
11 1st Ave SW, Rochester, MN 55902

## Contact

- Email: info@massaieservices.com
- Phone: +1 (507) 202-2501
